customers_say: Customers find this water purifier to be the best in the market, appreciating its premium appearance and excellent taste. The installation process is free of cost, and customers consider it a budget-friendly option with no AMC or hidden costs. The water quality receives positive feedback, with one customer noting the TDS value is below 100. While many customers report excellent working performance, some mention issues with the machine not working properly.

reviews.author: Amazon Customer
reviews.title: Best product in best price
reviews.body: Excellent product and best service by UC professional. The best part is their 2 years unlimited warranty on the entire product and no service cost for 2 years.

reviews.author: RANJAN BURAGOHAIN
reviews.title: Excellent Water Purifier & Hassle-Free Installation
reviews.body: The water purifier was delivered and installed promptly. It looks premium, works quietly, and the water tastes clean and fresh. The installation technician explained everything clearly and completed the setup professionally. I'm very happy with the purchase. I'll continue using it and update my review if anything changes, but my first impression has been excellent. Highly recommended! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

reviews.author: Gohil Vinay Pravinbhai
reviews.title: EXCELLENT RO WATER PURIFIER
reviews.body: EXCELLENT SERVICE FROM URBAN COMPANY AND TIMELY FITTING OF PURIFIER WATER QUALITY I BEST AND GOOD WATER SAVING TECHNOLOGY

reviews.author: ANGOTHU NARESH
reviews.title: Affordable and best purifier
reviews.body: Good purifier and well maintained technician who came on time and done installation perfectly... Go for it... If any complaints I will edit it here after 3 months

reviews.author: jayesh
reviews.title: Good Product
reviews.body: Nice product good look and functionality.
